source_name: GOV.UK Housing supply net additional dwellings
value_or_description: Annual housing supply in England amounted to 208600 net additional dwellings in 2024-25.
relevance_to_promise: Relevant to promises about increasing housing supply and social or affordable housebuilding.

source_name: ONS UK housebuilding starts and completions
value_or_description: ONS dataset bringing together quarterly UK totals for newly built dwellings started and completed.
relevance_to_promise: Relevant to promises about increasing housebuilding and monitoring housing delivery over time.
notes: Useful measurable indicator because it tracks both starts and completions.

source_name: GOV.UK Planning overhaul to reach 1.5 million new homes
value_or_description: Government announcement on planning reform connected to the target of delivering 1.5 million homes.
relevance_to_promise: Relevant to promises about planning reform, housebuilding targets, local plans, and brownfield development.
notes: Policy action evidence rather than final outcome evidence.

value_or_description: The National Planning Policy Framework sets out the government planning policies for England.
relevance_to_promise: Relevant to promises about updating planning rules, local plans, and the brownfield first approach.
notes: Useful for checking whether planning-related promises become formal policy.

source_name: GOV.UK Affordable housing supply in England 2024 to 2025
value_or_description: Official statistics on new affordable homes, including affordable homes for rent.
relevance_to_promise: Relevant to promises about social and affordable housebuilding and new social rented homes.
notes: Outcome indicator for affordable housing delivery.

source_name: Affordable Homes Programme annual report 2024 to 2025
value_or_description: Annual report on the Affordable Homes Programme, including additional funding and delivery targets.
relevance_to_promise: Relevant to promises about increasing social and affordable housebuilding.

source_name: Delivering a decade of renewal for social and affordable housing
value_or_description: Government document setting out long-term investment in social and affordable housing, including a 10-year programme.
relevance_to_promise: Relevant to promises about the biggest increase in social and affordable housebuilding.

indicator_name: Renters' rights and private renting reform
value_or_description: Parliamentary bill evidence related to private renting reform, including no-fault evictions and renters' rights.
relevance_to_promise: Relevant to promises about abolishing Section 21 no-fault evictions and allowing renters to challenge unreasonable rent increases.
notes: Legal and policy evidence; final status depends on bill progress.

value_or_description: Government guide explaining the Renters' Rights Bill and proposed reforms for private renters.
relevance_to_promise: Relevant to promises about renters' protection, no-fault evictions, and rent increases.
notes: Policy explanation source that can support status classification.

value_or_description: Legislation related to leasehold and freehold reform.
relevance_to_promise: Relevant to promises about leasehold reform and ground rent charges.
notes: Legal evidence; may need checking against Labour manifesto promises because some legislation started before the current government.

value_or_description: Government information on the mortgage guarantee scheme.
relevance_to_promise: Relevant to promises about supporting first-time buyers and mortgage guarantees.
notes: Policy evidence for home ownership support.

source_name: GOV.UK Live tables on house building
value_or_description: Government live tables on house building, including permanent dwellings started and completed.
relevance_to_promise: Relevant to promises about housing supply, housebuilding, and affordable or social housing delivery.
notes: Useful source for measurable housing indicators over time.
